hypothesis: Add price drop flag features using fast vectorized computation (no groupby rolling): price_drop_7 = 1 if current sell_price < lag_7 of sell_price, else 0. price_drop_28 = 1 if current sell_price < lag_28 of sell_price, else 0. Computed via simple shift operations which are O(n) and very fast. All other settings match best run (exp_0044, WRMSSE=0.94391).
